\tzpentry{ID3995}{Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3995 introduces Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\det(\\hat{J}_p) \\to 0 \\quad \\text{where} \\quad \\hat{J}_p = \\nabla \\times v_{vac}$$
